title: Holt of the Secret Service
writer: Basil Dickey, George H. Plympton, Wyndham Gittens
actors: Jack Holt, Evelyn Brent, C. Montague Shaw
plot: A murderous gang of counterfeiters has kidnapped the government's best engraver and is forcing him to print virtually undetectable phony money. The Secret Service sends its toughest agent, Jack Holt, and a female partner after the...
